SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.fastsimulation

Class KValueProcessSimulator

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.fastsimulation.KValueProcessSimulator
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class KValueProcessSimulator extends Object implements Serializable
Fast process simulator that reuses cached unit K-values from one rigorous base-case run.

The simulator walks the same process graph as the original ProcessSystem. Source streams inject component molar flows, separator-like units use frozen K = y/x values with Rachford-Rice routing, and other units use conservative frozen split factors. Recycle loops are handled by fixed-point iteration over stream component flows.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim Development Team
See Also:

    • KValueProcessSimulator

      private KValueProcessSimulator(ProcessSystem process, String[] componentNames, double[] molarMass, List<KValueUnitProfile> unitProfiles)
      Creates a simulator from already extracted data.
      Parameters:
      process - solved base-case process
      componentNames - component names
      molarMass - component molar masses in kg/mol
      unitProfiles - unit profiles in process order

  • Method Details

    • fromBaseCase

      public static KValueProcessSimulator fromBaseCase(ProcessSystem process)
      Extracts a K-value simulator from a solved base-case process.
      Parameters:
      process - solved base-case process; must be non-null
      Returns:
      K-value fast simulator

    • setMaxIterations

      public void setMaxIterations(int maxIterations)
      Sets the maximum number of fixed-point iterations.
      Parameters:
      maxIterations - maximum iteration count; must be positive

    • setTolerance

      public void setTolerance(double tolerance)
      Sets the fixed-point convergence tolerance.
      Parameters:
      tolerance - convergence tolerance; must be positive

    • run

      public KValueProcessResult run()
      Runs the fast process simulation at the base-case source flows.
      Returns:
      fast simulation result

    • runWithSourceFlowMultipliers

      public KValueProcessResult runWithSourceFlowMultipliers(Map<String,Double> sourceFlowMultipliers)
      Runs the fast process simulation with source-flow multipliers.
      Parameters:
      sourceFlowMultipliers - source-name to multiplier map; missing sources use 1.0
      Returns:
      fast simulation result

    • runWithSourceFlowRates

      public KValueProcessResult runWithSourceFlowRates(Map<String,Double> sourceFlowRates, String unit)
      Runs the fast process simulation with replacement source total flow rates.
      Parameters:
      sourceFlowRates - source-name to total flow-rate map; missing sources use base flow
      unit - flow-rate unit: mole/sec, mole/hr, kg/sec, or kg/hr
      Returns:
      fast simulation result

    • benchmarkSourceFlowMultipliers

      public KValueProcessBenchmarkResult benchmarkSourceFlowMultipliers(String sourceName, double[] multipliers)
      Benchmarks fast source multiplier cases against rigorous process reruns.
      Parameters:
      sourceName - source stream to perturb
      multipliers - source total-flow multipliers to test
      Returns:
      benchmark result with timings and terminal mass consistency

      Returns:
      fast simulation result

    • buildResult

      private KValueProcessResult buildResult(Map<StreamInterface,double[]> streamFlows, Map<String,double[]> sourceFlows, int iterations, double residual, long runTime)
      Builds a named result from identity-keyed stream flows.
      Parameters:
      streamFlows - identity-keyed stream flow map
      sourceFlows - source flows keyed by source name
      iterations - fixed-point iterations used
      residual - final residual
      runTime - runtime in nanoseconds
      Returns:
      result object

    • sumInletFlows

      private double[] sumInletFlows(KValueUnitProfile profile, Map<StreamInterface,double[]> streamFlows)
      Sums all inlet flows to a unit profile.
      Parameters:
      profile - unit profile
      streamFlows - current stream flows
      Returns:
      component flow vector in mole/sec

      private void restoreSourceFlows(Map<String,Double> baseKgPerHr)

      baseKgPerHr - base total source rates in kg/hr

      nodeUnits - node units to scan
      Returns:

      Adds stream components to a slate.
      Parameters:
      stream - stream to scan
      molarMassByComponent - component molar-mass map to update

    • buildProfile

      private static KValueUnitProfile buildProfile(ProcessEquipmentInterface unit, String[] componentNames)
      Builds one unit profile.
      Parameters:
      unit - unit to profile
      componentNames - component slate
      Returns:
      unit profile

    • buildFallbackFactors

      private static double[][] buildFallbackFactors(List<StreamInterface> outlets, double[] inletComponentFlow, String[] componentNames)
      Builds frozen fallback split factors.
      Parameters:
      outlets - outlet streams
      inletComponentFlow - inlet component flows in mole/sec
      componentNames - component slate
      Returns:
      split factors indexed by outlet and component

    • extractKValues

      private static double[] extractKValues(StreamInterface gasOutlet, StreamInterface liquidOutlet, String[] componentNames)
      Extracts cached K-values from gas and liquid outlet compositions.
      Parameters:
      gasOutlet - gas outlet stream
      liquidOutlet - liquid outlet stream
      componentNames - component slate
      Returns:
      K-value vector

    • findGasOutletIndex

      private static int findGasOutletIndex(List<StreamInterface> outlets)
      Finds the gas outlet in a two- or three-outlet unit.
      Parameters:
      outlets - outlet streams
      Returns:
      gas outlet index, or -1 when not found or ambiguous

    • findWaterOutletIndex

      private static int findWaterOutletIndex(List<StreamInterface> outlets)
      Finds the water outlet in a three-outlet unit.
      Parameters:
      outlets - outlet streams
      Returns:
      water outlet index, or -1 when not found or ambiguous

    • findRemainingOutletIndex

      private static int findRemainingOutletIndex(int outletCount, int gasOutletIndex, int waterOutletIndex)
      Finds the remaining outlet index after gas and water have been identified.
      Parameters:
      outletCount - number of outlets
      gasOutletIndex - gas outlet index
      waterOutletIndex - water outlet index
      Returns:
      remaining outlet index, or -1 if the indexes are invalid

    • isGasOutlet

      private static boolean isGasOutlet(StreamInterface stream)
      Tests whether an outlet stream is gas-like.
      Parameters:
      stream - stream to classify
      Returns:
      true for gas-like streams

      private static boolean isWaterOutlet(StreamInterface stream)
      Tests whether an outlet stream is water-like.
      Parameters:
      stream - stream to classify
      Returns:
      true for water-like streams

      Returns:

      Rescales a source vector to a new total flow.
      Parameters:
      baseFlow - base component vector in mole/sec
      totalFlow - new total flow
      unit - total-flow unit
      Returns:
      rescaled component vector in mole/sec

    • convertTotalFlowToMolePerSec

      private double convertTotalFlowToMolePerSec(double[] baseFlow, double totalFlow, String unit)
      Converts a total source flow to mole/sec.
      Parameters:
      baseFlow - base component vector in mole/sec
      totalFlow - total flow value
      unit - flow unit
      Returns:
      total molar flow in mole/sec

      unit - requested unit
      Returns:
